name: prompt registry: when from_inline_agent:true, golden_output_diff field must be non-empty (operator can review)
command:
printf -- "- id: test
  versions:
    - version: 1.0.0
      file: prompts/test/v1.0.0.md
      hash: sha256:S
      created: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z
      eval_pass_rate: 0.9
      regression_from_prior: 0
      status: active
      migration:
        from_inline_agent: true
        golden_output_diff: ""
        delta_status: zero-delta
" > registry.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-prompt-registry.sh" "$PWD/registry.yaml"
